name: Sourdough Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup raisins, or cut up prunes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the sourdough starter.
4. Sift together the dry ingredients: whole wheat pastry flour, baking powder, ground nutmeg, and vanilla.
5. Alternately add the sourdough batter and sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture until just combined.
6. Fold in the raisins (or prunes) and chopped nuts.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
